mapper.select: SELECT id, target_id, target_type, settlement_month, settlement_deadline, total_sales, total_fee, net_amount, bank_name, account_number, status, completed_at, memo FROM SETTLEMENT ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, target_id, target_type, settlement_month, settlement_deadline, total_sales, total_fee, net_amount, bank_name, account_number, status, completed_at, memo FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY settlement_month DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE SETTLEMENT SET status = '정산완료', completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
